page: The Vultr voc-g-1c-4gb-30s-amd is an instance within the Optimized Cloud Compute family, utilizing the x86_64 architecture. It features a single shared AMD vCPU, consisting of one physical core and one thread. The system is equipped with 4.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced 1:4 ratio of vCPU to RAM.

For local storage, this server includes 30 GB of NVMe SSD capacity, which provides fast read and write speeds for basic applications. It does not feature any dedicated GPU hardware. Network connectivity is supported by one complimentary public IPv4 address.

Due to its shared CPU allocation, this instance represents a budget-friendly option for workloads that do not require continuous, dedicated CPU performance. The combination of AMD processing, NVMe storage, and a balanced memory profile makes it suitable for lightweight applications, small web servers, development environments, and basic database hosting.
description: The Vultr voc-g-1c-4gb-30s-amd is an entry-level virtual machine from the Optimized Cloud Compute family, built on the x86_64 architecture. It is powered by a single shared AMD vCPU with one physical core and one thread. The hardware configuration includes 4.0 GB of system memory and 30 GB of local NVMe SSD storage, offering a balanced resource profile for low-intensity tasks. This server does not include dedicated GPU resources but does provide one complimentary public IPv4 address. Given its shared CPU allocation, this instance is a cost-efficient option for workloads with variable resource demands. It is best suited for lightweight web serving, development environments, testing, and small-scale databases.
og_description: Vultr voc-g-1c-4gb-30s-amd is a shared AMD-based virtual machine featuring 1 vCPU, 4.0 GB of RAM, and 30 GB of NVMe SSD storage, designed for budget-conscious, low-intensity workloads.

tagline: A budget-friendly shared AMD instance featuring balanced memory and local NVMe storage for lightweight workloads and development environments.

30 GB of local NVMe SSD storage

Suitable for lightweight web serving and development environments
